explicit_auth_ref.rollback_unit: not guaranteed to stay inside the sandbox root if the referenced auth file lives elsewhere
explicit_auth_ref.forbidden_root_risk: elevated unless a later contour separately narrows and admits the external source

sandbox_auth_json.rollback_unit: delete auth.json or remove the whole sandbox root tree under the existing rollback runbook
sandbox_auth_json.forbidden_root_risk: bounded if later writes remain inside the declared sandbox root
